name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause late fees and service interruptions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: Missed contract renewal dates leading to late fees and service interruptions.

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewal dates leading to late fees and service interruptions.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause late fees and service interruptions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders

one_liner: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause late fees and service interruptions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
